title: Piquant Smoky Peruvian Potato Tiradito
description: A smoky and comforting Peruvian dish featuring crispy potatoes in a zesty vinaigrette dressing, served in an earthenware bowl.

ingredients.name: potatoes
ingredients.notes: peeled and cut into 1/2 inch cubes

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Carefully add the potato cubes to the hot oil and fry until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Remove the potatoes from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
In a blender or food processor, combine the lime juice, smoked paprika, garlic, aji amarillo peppers, salt, and black pepper, and blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, combine the fried potatoes, blended vinaigrette, and chopped cilantro, and toss to coat.
Divide the potato mixture among four earthenware bowls.
Garnish each bowl with additional cilantro if desired.
